item.title: "The Abstract Show" will be displayed from April 1 -25. Intake will be from March 25-28. - 04/16/2026 6:00pm EDT to 04/30/2026 8:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get ready for a bold, vibrant, and unpredictable art experience! The Abstract Art Exhibit is all about letting go, embracing creativity, and seeing the world through an entirely new lens. Whether you're an artist or an admirer, this is a show that will challenge, inspire, and excite both the creator and the viewer! Abstract art is more than just shapes and colors, it's about emotion, movement, and limitless expression. Every piece in this exhibit pushes the boundaries of imagination, drawing you into a world where rules are meant to be broken, and where creativity knows no limits. Expect a dazzling mix of mediums, including photography, painting, sculpture, textiles, digital art, jewelry, pastels, glass, and more. If you can dream it, it belongs here! Whether youÕre showcasing your work or simply soaking in the creativity, donÕt miss this one-of-a kind exhibit. Step inside, explore, and let your imagination run wild!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild

item.title: 13th Annual Protective Services 5K - 04/18/2026 8:30am EDT to 04/18/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description:
Location : 491 Coe St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Join Us for the 13th Annual Protective Services 5K!

Get ready to lace up your sneakers and hit the pavement with fellow enthusiasts at this fun, in-person event to promote child abuse awareness and prevention. Whether you're a seasoned runner or prefer to walk, the 13th Annual Protective Services 5K is perfect for everyone. Bring your dog too! Come enjoy the energy, the community spirit, and show your support! Don’t miss out on the action—see you at the starting line! We will start at the American Legion Shelter at Hedges Boyer Park and follow the Rock Creek Trail.

We've experienced some sprinkles in years past and we don't let that stop us. In the event of significant rain, the event will be held at Frann's Fieldhouse, on the Heidelberg campus. Please watch our Facebook page (Seneca County JFS) for updates.

Dogs are welcome. Please have them on a leash and be sure to pick up anything they leave behind.

This is a free event.

8:30 am: Registration and packet pick-up

8:50 am: Opening Remarks

9: 00 am: Runners Start

9:05 am: Walkers Start
item.dc:creator: Seneca County JFS

item.title: Tiffin Moose Lodge Monthly All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet - 04/18/2026 9:00am EDT to 04/18/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1146 OH-53, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin Moose Lodge Monthly All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet April 18th 9 a.m. - 11:00 a.m. Open to the public. The cost is $10 for ages 11 and up. $5 ages 6-10. Kids 5 and under eat free. Menu: Scrambled Eggs Hashbrowns Sausage gravy and biscuits French Toast Sticks, Sausage patties Fruit Cocktail Coffee. The social quarters will be open so that you may purchase other beverage options including Bloody Mary's, Clamdiggers and more. Please help spread the word and share this event.
item.dc:creator: The Tiffin Moose - Lodge 846

item.title: 4-H Natural Resource Clinic—Fish - 04/18/2026 9:00am EDT to 04/18/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Ohio 4-H and the Seneca County Parks are joining together to offer activities and experiences about fish—identification and anatomy, equipment and tackle box, knots and casting. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.  9AM - 10:30AM.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks

item.title: 20-HR OPOTA Security Firearm Certification (10 hr classroom & 10 hr range) - 04/18/2026 9:00am EDT to 04/19/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 17 Findlay St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA 20-Hour Ohio Peace Officer Training Commission (OPOTC) firearm certification course fulfills all state requirements to obtain your OPOTC.
item.dc:creator: Jonathon Gronvall Bee-Safe® LLC

item.title: Breakfast at JAM’s Markets SATURDAYS 9-2pm - 04/18/2026 9:00am EDT to 04/18/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy from scratch made breakfast and lunch items featuring buzzworthy sourdough artisan breads
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets

item.title: Spring Fling at The Farmhouse - 04/18/2026 10:00am EDT to 04/19/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 11351 E Township Rd 44, Attica, OH 44807, USA Joins The Farmhouse Collection and The Rusty Star for a Springtime event! We will be joined by several unique vendors and Food and Beverage trucks for 2 days of shopping and socializing after a long winter!!
item.dc:creator: The Farmhouse Collection LLC

item.title: Spring Wildflower Hike - 04/18/2026 12:00pm EDT to 04/18/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Howard Collier State Nature Preserve, 1401-, 1499 W Township Rd 38, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Linda Rose as we walk the trails looking for and identifying spring wildflowers in the preserve.  Learn some interesting and fun facts.  This walk will last about 1 ¼ hours and qualifies for the Walking Stick Program.  Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks

item.title: Corner T Fun - 04/18/2026 4:00pm EDT to 04/18/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA null

item.title: Speed Dating Event at the Tiffin Community Kitchen - 04/18/2026 6:00pm EDT to 04/18/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Hey there! Ready to dive into a new relationship? Join us for a fun Speed Dating Event on April 18th! You'll enjoy great conversations, tasty appetizers, and refreshing drinks while meeting new people. We can't wait to see you there! Click the link to sign up today! https://tiffin-seneca-farmers-market.square.site/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen

item.title: Into the Woods - 04/18/2026 7:00pm EDT to 04/18/2026 9:30pm EDT
item.description:
Location : University Hall, 310 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Heidelberg University School of Music and Theatre presents Into the Woods.

Be careful what you wish for... 🌲✨

Heidelberg University School of Music and Theatre invites you to a spellbinding production of Stephen Sondheim and James Lapine’s Into the Woods. Watch as the worlds of Cinderella, Little Red Riding Hood, and Jack and the Beanstalk collide in a darkly comic exploration of what happens after "happily ever after."

Join a baker and his wife on their quest to break a witch's curse—and discover the true cost of getting everything you ever wanted.

📍 Where: Gundlach Theatre 

📅 When: * April 16, 17, & 18 | 7:00 PM

April 19 | 2:00 PM

Tickets:

 https://www.eventbrite.com/cc/into-the-woods-4810285

Poster Design by Bri Clark, BA’23 and MBA’24

Into the Woods is presented through special arrangement with Music Theatre International (MTI).

 All authorized performance materials are also supplied by MTI.

www.mtishows.com
item.dc:creator: Heidelberg University School of Music and Theatre

item.title: Rick Springfield - 04/18/2026 7:30pm EDT to 04/18/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Saturday, April 18, 2026 – 7:30 PM Over the past [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre

item.title: Rick Springfield - 04/18/2026 7:30pm EDT to 04/18/2026 9:30pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Over the past four decades, Rick Springfield has worn many hats as an entertainer and performer. The creator of some of the finest power-pop of the ’80s, a Grammy winning singer, songwriter, and musician who has sold 25 million albums and scored 17 U.S. Top 40 hits, including “Jessie’s Girl,” “Don’t Talk to Strangers,” “An Affair of the Heart,” “I’ve Done Everything for You,” “Love Somebody,” and “Human Touch.” He’s an accomplished actor who has starred opposite Meryl Streep in the feature film “Ricki and the Flash,” gave a chameleonic performance as the creepy Dr. Irving Pitlor in HBO’s prestige drama “True Detective,” earned great reviews for his portrayal of Lucifer on the CW hit “Supernatural” and most recently played the insane Pastor Charles on FX’s worldwide hit series “American Horror Story.” An author as well, both his candid 2010 memoir Late, Late at Night (which Rolling Stone named one of the 25 greatest rock memoirs of all time) and his 2014 comedic novel Magnificent Vibration earned rave reviews and spots on the New York Times Best Sellers’ list. In 2014, Springfield was honored with a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame, located around the corner from the first apartment he lived in when he first arrived in the U.S. from Australia in 1971. Springfield’s Sirius-XM radio show, Working Class DJ, is a huge hit and airs weekly on 80s on 8. His new album “Automatic” is out now. Automatic is his first album of all new original material in 5 years.

$125, $100, $75

Fan Club tickets go on sale November 10 at 10:00 AM

Public ticket sales begin November 17 at 10:00 AM.
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre

item.title: Into the Woods - 04/19/2026 2:00pm EDT to 04/19/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description:
Location : University Hall, 310 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Heidelberg University School of Music and Theatre presents Into the Woods.

Be careful what you wish for... 🌲✨

Heidelberg University School of Music and Theatre invites you to a spellbinding production of Stephen Sondheim and James Lapine’s Into the Woods. Watch as the worlds of Cinderella, Little Red Riding Hood, and Jack and the Beanstalk collide in a darkly comic exploration of what happens after "happily ever after."

Join a baker and his wife on their quest to break a witch's curse—and discover the true cost of getting everything you ever wanted.

📍 Where: Gundlach Theatre 

📅 When: * April 16, 17, & 18 | 7:00 PM

April 19 | 2:00 PM

Tickets:

 https://www.eventbrite.com/cc/into-the-woods-4810285

Poster Design by Bri Clark, BA’23 and MBA’24

Into the Woods is presented through special arrangement with Music Theatre International (MTI).

 All authorized performance materials are also supplied by MTI.

www.mtishows.com

item.description: Location : 44 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA Join the New Riegel Junior High and High School ensembles for their Spring Concert! 6:30 = Junior High Band & Choir 7:00 = High School Band, Jazz Band, Theatrical Arts, Jacket Company

item.title: Dine to Donate - 04/20/2026 3:00pm EDT to 04/20/2026 10:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Dine for a Cause! Join us on April 20, 2026 for a delicious way to give back! Head over to Xcaret Mexican Resturaunt and enjoy your favorite meals while supporting the Tiffin-Seneca Heritage Festival 15% of all sales from the day will go directly to the festival—helping continue 46 years of celebrating history, community, and unforgettable memories! Date: April 20, 2026 Location: Xcaret Mexican Food Bring your friends, bring your appetite, and help make a difference—one taco at a time
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Heritage Festival

item.title: OPEN HOUSE - Teach Nature Education Center - 04/20/2026 4:00pm EDT to 04/20/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Fruth Wetland Nature Preserve, 10130 OH-18, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Plan Your Perfect Event at the Teach Nature Education Center!
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks

item.title: Ribbon Cutting | Buckeye Community Schools - 04/20/2026 4:00pm EDT to 04/20/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 870 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Regional Chamber & Development Ambassadors in celebrating the grand opening of Buckeye Community Schools’ Tiffin location with a ribbon cutting and open house on April 20, 2026, from 4–6 PM. Buckeye Community Schools is a public charter high school serving students ages 14–21, offering an alternative educational environment designed to help students succeed on their own terms. With a unique paper-and-pencil curriculum and a personalized approach, each student is paired with the same instructor throughout their educational journey, building strong relationships, consistency, and support. BCS prides itself on creating a different kind of learning experience, meeting students where they are and empowering them to achieve their academic goals in a supportive and flexible setting. Guests are encouraged to stay for the open house, tour the new facility, and learn more about the impact Buckeye Community Schools is making in Seneca County.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development

item.title: Young Adventurers—Salamanders - 04/20/2026 5:00pm EDT to 04/20/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Mercy Community Nature Preserve, 99 St Lawrence Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA For ages 5 to 12 years.  Join Linda Rose as we search for those little elusive salamanders hiding in the leaf litter.  Learn some interesting fact and have fun looking for them. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks

item.title: PLT MONTHLY MEETING - 04/20/2026 5:00pm EDT to 04/20/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 1202 H L Ford Dr, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Come and join a great group while we discuss on-going fundraisers and event planning for Fostoria Elementary school.

item.title: Laundry Day - 04/21/2026 9:00am EDT to 04/21/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Sign up for our free laundry days this month, Tuesday, April 7th and 21st, 9am-3pm. Each family can wash 1 load per month free, laundry detergent is also provided. You must sign up online for an appointment by clicking the link below, or contact Fostoria Church of the Nazarene or the United Way of Fostoria by phone to help you sign up. The location is 339 Sandusky Street in the FNC Community Center https://www.signupgenius.com/.../10C0548AEAB2FAAFBC25...

item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Story Time is best suited for almost 3 year-olds through Kindergarten, lasts for 45-60 minutes, and includes stories, songs, extension activities & a craft.

item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Teen Tuesday - 04/21/2026 3:00pm EDT to 04/21/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA “Teen Tuesdays” will be returning to the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library every Tuesday from 3:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room beginning Tuesday, September 2. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly afterschool hangout for games, snacks, crafts and more. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Triple P: Positive Parenting Program - 04/21/2026 5:00pm EDT to 04/21/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA We will have a follow up program from our Caregivers Cafe in 2 weeks called Triple P: Positive Parenting Program on Tuesday, April 21st 5pm-8pm! Make sure to register so we can plan for food, and also because there are only a limited number of spaces available.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene

item.title: CASA Volunteer Training Orientation - 04/21/2026 5:00pm EDT to 04/21/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 21 Court St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Imagine being a child, moving from home to home… Never knowing who to trust. Never having someone to speak up for you. Now imagine YOU being the person who changes that story. A steady voice. A safe place. A lifeline in a difficult time. Our Spring Volunteer Training Orientation is Tuesday, April 21 at 5:00 PM at our Tiffin office (21 Court Street). For about 8 hours a month, you can help a child look back on their childhood with gratitude instead of regret. No legal background required — just heart, time, and a commitment to stand by a child when they need it most. Learn more or apply at www.casaofssw.org or call 419-448-1442. Because right now, there are children who desperately need you.
item.dc:creator: CASA of SSW

item.title: "Colored Pencil Blueberries and Spoon" Wednesday, April 22 , 9am-12pm #04222601 - 04/22/2026 9:00am EDT to 04/22/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA In this class you will use colored pencils to create a 5"x7" drawing of a blueberry spoon, learning about strokes and blending techniques. All supplies are provided. Preregistration is required by Friday March 6th, minimum class size is 3 people. The cost is $45 for TAG members & $55 for non-members. Contact Mike Fink (813-695-0506), or TAG (419-443-0478), or tiffinartguild@att.net with questions. You can also stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild

item.title: Chamber & Development Chat and Assist | April 2026 - 04/22/2026 10:00am EDT to 04/22/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA We've opened the doors to provide a better member experience for our chamber & development members and to help you get the most of your membership, ask questions, and get help to elevate your business! Chamber & Development Chat and Assist is an opportunity for our members to meet one on one with a Chamber & Development team member to understand and take advantage everything that comes with their membership, the opportunity to get help with anything from social media tips to Canva crash courses and beyond, to providing feedback to us so we can get better! Upcoming 2026 Chat & Assist dates include: Wednesday, May 27, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM Wednesday, June 24, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM Wednesday, July 22, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM Wednesday, August 26, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM Wednesday, September 23, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM Wednesday, October 28, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM You can secure a time (this is just so we know who to expect and how to best prepare!) at https://calendar.google.com/.../AcZssZ2Jz5jSs5OdbQ7h4VKho....
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development

item.title: GSH Choir "Hooked On Singing" Spring Concert - 04/22/2026 2:00pm EDT to 04/22/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 745 Columbus Ave, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us on Wednesday, April 22nd at 2pm in the GSH lower level for our GSH "Hooked on Singing" Spring concert! Under the direction of Karis Matz, our choir members have been practicing very hard and are excited to sing new songs for you! Please contact Activities Director Wahneta Mockensturm at wmockensturm@goodshepherdhome.com or 419-937-1801 with any questions. We hope to see you then!
item.dc:creator: Good Shepherd Home

item.title: Teen Art Club - 04/22/2026 3:00pm EDT to 04/22/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Teen Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public library will host “Teen Art Club” on Wednesdays, April 8 and 22 from 3:00 to 4:30 p.m. in the Teen Area. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to get creative with other artsy teens. Teens are encouraged to bring their own drawings and projects or just drop by to explore a new project. The Library will provide craft supplies and the opportunity to learn new arts and crafts skills. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: CHIPOTLE FUNDRAISER FOR ALLEN EIRY CENTER - 04/22/2026 4:00pm EDT to 04/22/2026 5:00pm EDT

item.title: Shred Day at Your Legacy FCU - 04/23/2026 10:00am EDT to 04/23/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get your stuff together and ready to come drop off your confidential and outdated personal mail and documents! Last year, we collected 1933 lbs. of material, an average to 56.85 LBS. per person. and we'd like to blow it out of the water! Make plans to drop it off on Thursday, April 23rd from 10-2 in our parking lot and we'll be happy to unload your vehicle and take it from there. See you then!
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union

Folding chair seating and popcorn provided! See what's showing by visiting our website https://www.senecaeastlibrary.org/.../family-movie-night-14.

item.title: Discovery Series—Spring Floodplain Exploration - 04/23/2026 6:00pm EDT to 04/23/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 5090 W Township Rd 36, Kansas, OH 44841, USA For youth ages 12 to 17 years and older.  Join Linda Rose as we explore and learn about this floodplain restoration project.  Wear boots for exploring the wetlands and identifying what we find. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.

item.title: "Colored Pencil Apple" Thursday, April 23, 6pm-9pm #04232602 - 04/23/2026 6:00pm EDT to 04/23/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA In this class you will use colored pencils to create a 5"x7" drawing of an apple, learning about strokes and blending techniques. All supplies are provided. Preregistration is required by Saturday, April 18. Minimum class size is 3 people. The cost is $45 for TAG members & $55 for non-members. Contact Mike Fink (813-695-0506), or TAG (419-443-0478), or tiffinartguild@att.net with questions. You can also stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild

item.title: Micallef White Release ~ Cut and Light - 04/23/2026 6:00pm EDT to 04/23/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 58 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us as Jeremy Ellis of Micallef Cigars introduces the newest addition to the Micallef lineup ~ the WHITE! This cut and light event features: ~EXCLUSIVE EVENT ONLY DEALS ~A CHANCE TO WIN MICALLEF SWAG, CIGARS and MORE Sit back, light up and enjoy your purchase in our comfortable lounge BYOB (We supply the drinkware) Non-alcoholic beverages available for purchase
item.dc:creator: The Social Cigar

item.title: LIFEGUARDING COURSE - 04/24/2026 12:00am EDT to 04/26/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 180 Summit St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Ready to make a difference this summer? 🌊☀️

Become a certified lifeguard and gain the skills to save lives, build confidence, and become a leader!

Important Details:

APRIL 24-26, 2026

Friday 4p-8p, Saturday 8a-5p, & Sunday 8a-5p

• Blended course format – 7 hours of online coursework must be completed before the first day of class

• Swim assessment required one week prior to the first class- Friday at 6pm

• Attendance is mandatory for all scheduled days (no make-up sessions)

• Registration closes one week before the class begins

• Limited to just 8 students per class – reserve your spot early!

Don’t wait—spots fill fast! 📅 Enroll now at the Tiffin Community YMCA and dive into a new opportunity!
item.dc:creator: YMCA of Bucyrus-Tiffin, Inc

item.title: 9:30a | Friends of the Library Book Sale - 04/24/2026 9:30am EDT to 04/24/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Volunteer Fair - 04/24/2026 10:00am EDT to 04/24/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come join us for the Volunteer Fair on April 24th! Discover meaningful ways to make a difference in your community and connect with a variety of organizations looking for passionate volunteers. Free giveaways and raffles! Interested in hosting a table? Please contact Jaime Cole RSVP Coordinator at 859-551-9605 or jaime.cole@axessfamily.org
item.dc:creator: Retired & Senior Volunteer Program

item.title: Corner T Fun - 04/24/2026 4:00pm EDT to 04/24/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA null
item.dc:creator: New Riegel Cafe

item.title: Family Funday Friday - 04/24/2026 6:30pm EDT to 04/24/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : Fruth Wetland Nature Preserve, 10130 OH-18, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Family Funday Friday is an evening program for families to enjoy time together at Fruth Wetland & Nature Preserve. This all ages event will include free popcorn and hot dogs for the family, along with board games, outdoor activities, and more! Registration is encouraged, but walk-ins are welcome. 6:30PM - 8:30PM
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks

item.title: Downtown Tiffin Clean Up ~ April 2026 - 04/25/2026 9:00am EDT to 04/25/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for a Downtown Tiffin Clean-Up on Saturday, April 25, 2026, from 9:00–10:30 AM! We’ll meet at Cherry Alley, and we’ll have everything you need (trash bags, brooms, dust-pans, and gloves). Who can volunteer? Everyone! Come on your own, bring a friend, or build a group and join "Bunky’s Litter League", a community-wide initiative focused on litter cleanup and beautification. Teams can include: Businesses Neighborhood groups Faith-based organizations Civic and service groups Clubs Families, individuals, and more... Volunteers are what make this event possible. Your help keeps downtown clean, welcoming, and vibrant. Please register to volunteer by clicking the “Ticket” tab. Save the dates (more clean-ups!) June 27, 2026 September 12, 2026 November 21, 2026 (Leaf Clean-Up)
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin

item.title: Breakfast at JAM’s Markets SATURDAYS 9-2pm - 04/25/2026 9:00am EDT to 04/25/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy from scratch made breakfast and lunch items featuring buzzworthy sourdough artisan breads
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
